first_matrix_finding.reason: The best configured candidate underperformed the market favorite baseline on ROI, log loss, and Brier score.

mlflow_posture.recommendation: Keep the first layer as checked-in JSON config plus JSON/Markdown run artifacts. Add MLflow later if the local registry grows enough that a tracking UI, run search, or artifact comparison dashboard becomes the bottleneck.

next_experiment_policy: Use the harness to add curated variants quickly.
Keep all outputs report-only on the current corpus.
Promote nothing to validated status until a locked future evaluation slice clears the market gate.

smoke_gate.reason: This epic added a pure Python report-only CLI and committed artifacts. It did not add an HTTP endpoint or UI surface.
